title: Tithymalus heterophyllus
taxonomy: Tithymalus heterophyllus is classified under the family Euphorbiaceae. The genus Tithymalus is considered a synonym of the genus Euphorbia. As such, Tithymalus heterophyllus is also classified under the genus Euphorbia. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its botanical relationship to other species. uses: Tithymalus heterophyllus, also known as Euphorbia heterophylla, has been traditionally used in various folk remedies due to its medicinal properties. The plant's sap has been used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The leaves and stems of Tithymalus heterophyllus have also been used to treat digestive issues and as a treatment for fever.
